chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 66 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.836/2023 (R/Surety) 04.10.2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Narejo, Advocate for applicant/surety. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Instant application has been filed by applicant Ali Raza seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supporting by report of Accountant of this Court, it is revealed that accused was granted protective bail subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-, vide order dated 15.08.2023, for a period of seven days. The applicant stood surety on his behalf by submitting three original Defence Savings Certificates amounting to Rs.10,000/- (making total of Rs.30,000/-). Within stipulated time, on 18.08.2023, the accused appeared before the trial Court along with an application U/S 498 CrPC, as is evident from the order dated 18.08.2023 of Anti- Terrorism Court, Khairpur, annexed with the application. In view of above, and the no objection for grant of the application extended by learned Additional P.G, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
